site_info.title: m.elouardi | root system
site_info.bio_description: Self-taught programmer and cybersecurity researcher focusing on Reverse Engineering and System Exploitation.
site_info.footer_text: No System Is Safe. // © 2026 Mohamed Elouardi

whoami.full_bio: I am a self-taught programmer with practical experience in building web applications and system optimization tools. I focus on low-level security, including Python bytecode analysis and binary reverse engineering.
